description: StdGEN 4-class to Strata 20-class semantic mapping definition

body.notes: Split into 16 body sub-regions using VRM skeleton bone weights. Each vertex is assigned the region of its highest-weight bone via VRM_BONE_ALIASES.

clothes.notes: Maps to the body region underneath. Determined by dominant bone weight of each vertex, same as body class.

hair.notes: Direct mapping. All hair geometry maps to head region.

face.notes: Direct mapping. All facial features map to head region.

fallback_region.name: chest
fallback_region.notes: Vertices with no valid bone weights default to chest as a safe central region.
